challenge.title: Board Games
challenge.desc: Find a place where you can play board games and take a photo with a unique board game that isn’t mainstream.

challenge.title: Marri(ott)-Go-Round
challenge.desc:
Visit two Marriott properties.

The nearest station to each property must be different. (Keep in mind, this doesn’t mean these hotels are named “Marriott”—they just have to be under the Marriott Bonvoy portfolio.)

Send a selfie with you within 10 feet in front of each property, being sure to keep the logos of the properties in your selfie.

Also, send the number of nights required to get Bonvoy Platinum Elite and the number of years required to get Bonvoy Lifetime Platinum Elite.

challenge.title: Street Parking
challenge.desc: Find somewhere with 2-hour free street parking. Take a picture of the sign, as well as at least one vehicle parked there. If there’s no vehicle parked or if the sign isn’t visible face-up, this challenge task isn’t considered completed.

challenge.title: Out-of-State License Plate
challenge.desc: Find a car in a Sound Transit parking lot or parking garage with an out-of-state plate.
challenge.privateNotes: It must be on Sound Transit property (whether owned or leased).

challenge.title: Japan
challenge.desc:
Visit all three of the following:

  1. A Japanese restaurant named after any city or district in Japan.
  2. A lakeside sushi restaurant.
  3. A ramen restaurant bearing the name of an island of Japan.

Taking a photo in front of the establishment suffices.
challenge.privateNotes:
The answers we're looking for:

1. Ginza
2. I Love Sushi
3. Hokkaido Ramen Santouka

challenge.title: Asian Groceries
challenge.desc: Visit two Asian grocery stores.
challenge.privateNotes:
Probably Uwajimaya and H-Mart in Bellevue.

Daiso will be reluctantly accepted.

challenge.title: OMF(G)
challenge.desc: Somewhere along the 2 Line is a track branching off to the Sound Transit Eastside Operations and Maintenance Facility (OMF). Take a photo of this branch from inside the train.

challenge.title: Vroom Vroom!
challenge.desc: Visit three car dealerships and take a selfie with at least one car being sold on each of the lots. The brand of the car must be clearly visible on your selfie with the vehicle. At most two dealerships can be on the same street.
challenge.privateNotes:
These could be Mercedes Benz, Infiniti, Audi, Porsche.

The Audi is away from everything else, so that is probably going have to be one of the three named, unless I forgot to list something here.

challenge.title: That’s No Space Needle
challenge.desc: Find the tallest building in downtown Bellevue as of 2023. Go within 10 feet of its base and take a selfie with the tallest visible portion of the building (in other words, the camera should be aimed upwards and your faces should be aimed downwards).
challenge.privateNotes: 555 Tower (also known as Amazon Sonic)

challenge.title: A Handle of Jamo
challenge.desc:
Find a handle of Jameson Whiskey, then calculate the total price after Washington State’s spirits sales and liter taxes. Send us the before-tax price and your calculation.

(A handle refers to a 1.75L container of liquor.)
challenge.privateNotes:
We are expecting them to go to Total Wine near Wilburton to complete this challenge.

Calculate the correct answer based on the price they send with this tool: https://jeffw.xyz/public/waslt

challenge.title: One and the Same
challenge.desc: Find the same product in two different stores. The nearest station to each store must be different. Send us photos of those products and which store you found them in. You need not purchase these products, but may if you wish to do so.

challenge.title: MATM
challenge.desc:
Visit and take a video and do the following things. You must be within 10 feet of the building’s outside perimeter of where guests can visit. You also need to tell us the exact location you are at.
  • Microsoft: Go to the new East Campus square and find the Microsoft logo with the 50th Anniversary logo. In front of it, have one team member shout “Developers Developers Developers” for 15 seconds straight, film it, and send that video to us.
  • Amazon: Go to any Amazon building and film someone tipping their imaginary cowboy hat and saying “I want to thank every Amazon employee and every Amazon customer, because you guys paid for all this”
  • T-Mobile: Go to any T-Mobile building and film someone list 5 things they hate about AT&T and/or Verizon
  • Meta: Go to any Meta building and film someone sipping on water like a lizard
    • Alternatively, if you have a more creative idea for any of these, do that instead. But if it's not as amusing as the above, you won't get points.
challenge.privateNotes: T-Mobile Launchpad
partDescs: Meta - Drinking water like a lizard
Amazon - You guys paid for all this

challenge.title: Straight From the Source
challenge.desc: Find the plant where Safeway makes its ice cream. Then, go to a Safeway and find some store-brand ice cream.
challenge.privateNotes: It should be right next to Spring Station

challenge.title: Ped Xing
challenge.desc: There are many signs across the Eastside honoring Michael Xing’s cousin Pedro, who’s known as Ped for short. Find three pedestrian crossing signs (with the walking person sign, or better yet, which says “PED XING”), all of which must be at least one mile apart from each other. Take a selfie with each of them and let us know their exact locations.

challenge.title: Hotpot
challenge.desc: Visit two hotpot restaurants. The nearest station to each restaurant must be different. Take a selfie in front of them and a photo/screenshot of their menu.
challenge.privateNotes:
The shabu shabu place at Overlake Village counts.

Dolar Shop and Haidilao are both near Bellevue DT Station so if those are the two, that doesn't count.

challenge.title: Hot Pot
challenge.desc: Visit two cannabis dispensaries and take a selfie in front of the store. (You must be within 10 feet of the storefront.) The nearest station to each dispensary must be at least two stations away from each other. (e.g., If there is a dispensary close to South Bellevue Station, then dispensaries closest to East Main Station don’t count—it would have to be a dispensary close to Bellevue Downtown Station, Wilburton Station, etc.)
challenge.privateNotes:
- Higher Leaf (Spring District)
- The Novel Tree (Bel-Red Station)
- Evergreen Market (Wilburton)

Keep in mind that Higher Leaf and The Novel Tree would be an invalid combo. Most likely the correct answer will be Evergreen Market and The Novel Tree.

challenge.title: Over-Caffeinated
challenge.desc: Find three coffee shops (which may or may not sell baked goods) within 1,000 feet of each other and take a photo in front of them with the logos clearly visible.
challenge.privateNotes:
Should be:

Cafe Hagen
The Starbucks near it
The Mercury Coffee near that

challenge.title: Bubbly²
challenge.desc: Find a store that sells both alcoholic beverages (such as wine, beer, or cocktails) and bubble tea (including matcha, Thai tea, etc.)

challenge.title: Edging to the Climb-Max
challenge.desc: Find a climbing gym where it is possible to top-rope. Take a photo outside of it.
challenge.privateNotes:
Edgeworks in Crossroads.

The Bel-Red Edgeworks does NOT count. That only has bouldering, not top-rope.

challenge.title: A Tale of Two Theaters
challenge.desc: Find two movie theaters owned by different parent companies. Take a selfie with some of the posters or names of movies they are now showing.
challenge.privateNotes:
1. Cinemark Theatres Lincoln Square (either the regular one or Reserve will work)
2. Regal Crossroads Bellevue

challenge.title: Taiwanese
challenge.desc: Find two Taiwanese restaurants, one of which must be east of Bel-Red Station. Take a selfie with each storefront, being sure to be within 10 feet of them, and send us a photo/screenshot of each of their menus.
challenge.privateNotes: 151 Days is east of Bel-Red Station

challenge.title: Pocari Sweat
challenge.desc: Find a store that sells bottles of Pocari Sweat and take a photo with it. If you are unable to find any stores, unfortunately this yields zero points. Attempt at your own risk!
challenge.privateNotes: Daiso and Uwajimaya are your best bets

challenge.title: Two City Halls
challenge.desc: There are “two” city halls in Bellevue. Visit the outside of both of them.
challenge.privateNotes: The Mini City Hall is located in Crossroads and should be open throughout the game.

challenge.title: Hindi Chini Bhai Bhai
challenge.desc: Find an Indian Chinese fusion restaurant. On its menu, find Gobi Manchurian. Take a selfie in front of the restaurant and a picture/screenshot of its menu.
challenge.privateNotes: Correct answer is Inchin's Bamboo Garden

challenge.title: It's Raining Rainier
challenge.desc:
Find 3 restaurants, cafes, or bars selling Rainier beer, at least one of which must have a Rainier neon sign on the window. Take a selfie with:

  • The neon sign, AND
  • For the other two establishments without neon signs, conspicuous evidence proving they serve Rainier.

You don’t need to actually buy any beer, although you are certainly welcome to do so.

Groceries, supermarkets, bodegas, drugstores, and convenience stores do not count for the purposes of this task.
challenge.privateNotes: Yes this is a repeat from the Fremont-Ballard one

challenge.title: In Bloom
challenge.desc:
Do you see cherry blossoms anywhere? If so, stand under them and take a video of you under them while blasting “In Bloom” by Nirvana from the album Nevermind. We should be able to hear “In Bloom” in your video.

NOTE: This is not guaranteed. If it’s not blooming, then this task is impossible to complete for all teams.
challenge.privateNotes: It must be cherry blossoms

challenge.title: Tutti Frutti
challenge.desc: Bellevue is home to several blueberry farms which are open for U-Pick. Although it’s not quite blueberry season yet, go within 1,000 feet of a blueberry farm and take a picture of the farm. As us city folk often cannot tell apart a farm from other less notable swaths of vegetation, you must also send us the location where your photo was taken as proof that you were within 1,000 feet of the correct place. (You cannot complete this challenge while riding a train or bus.)
challenge.privateNotes: https://maps.app.goo.gl/xkNGKM4rSCYae2YW8

challenge.title: Consulting Life
challenge.desc: Find an office for a major accounting consulting firm which is located right above a bar/brewery. Take a selfie with its logo and a separate selfie with the bar or brewery above which it is located.
challenge.privateNotes: Deloitte https://www.google.com/maps/place/Deloitte/@47.6214828,-122.177751,21z/data=!4m9!1m2!2m1!1scannabis!3m5!1s0x54906da3eeeb0095:0x88f31b6abd89b77e!8m2!3d47.6214999!4d-122.1777712!16s%2Fg%2F11tt91mh8f!5m1!1e1?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI1MDQwMi4xIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

challenge.title: Anti-Dote
challenge.desc: Find two coffee shops of the same chain which have locations immediately adjacent to 2 Line stations. Take selfies with each of their opening hours listed near their entrances. Then, at each coffee shop, quietly say one thing you don’t like about that coffee shop. (Film yourself doing so.)
challenge.privateNotes: Spring District and Redmond Tech

challenge.title: Rainier Expedition Inquisition
challenge.desc: Arjun needs microspikes for summiting Mt. Rainier before all of the snow melts in July. Can you help him find some?
challenge.privateNotes: There should be a few to choose from at REI Bellevue.

challenge.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Red
challenge.desc: Stage a scene where one team member slaps another. This should be a still photo, not a video. This must be done within 25 feet of the border between the cities of Bellevue and Redmond, and the background must make it evident that you are on/close enough to the border. You can do this while on a train or bus. (It should go without saying that no slapping should actually occur.)
challenge.privateNotes: This will most likely be done when the team is taking the 2 Line across 148th Ave NE. The street (or at least what's on the street) should be visible in the background.

challenge.title: Two Dick's
challenge.desc: Find a sign that has two different Dick’s logos on it. You need not actually go to those two Dick’s establishments. You can take this photo while riding on a train or bus.
challenge.privateNotes: It's the store signs posted at the northwest entrance of Crossroads. I believe it's at the northeast corner of 156th Ave NE and NE 13th St.

challenge.title: Find Arjun and Jeffrey
challenge.desc: Between 60 and 180 minutes after the game has started, you can find Arjun and Jeffrey somewhere in the game. A clue will be released on the Signal group chat after the game starts. Use this clue to find them and claim points.

challenge.title: Jeffrey’s Bad at Badminton
challenge.desc: Jeffrey wants to get better at badminton. Can you help Jeffrey find a badminton store and then a badminton academy so he can get better? Go to these two locations and send a selfie of you in front of them. Then film a video giving one actual advice to play badminton better.
challenge.privateNotes: The store and academy are all within walking distance of BelRed Station.

challenge.title: Exotic Spices
challenge.desc: Jeffrey wants some exotic Persian spices! Can you find some from a Persian store for him?
challenge.privateNotes: There is a Persian supermarket south of Spring District Station

challenge.title: Hold My Chops(ticks)
challenge.desc:
Buy a chopstick holder from Daiso for under $5 and send a selfie of you with it, as well as the receipt. Then, bring it with you all the way until the end of the game. You’ll be reimbursed for it up to $5.

If you forget to show it at the finish line, your team gets a 10 point penalty. The point penalty is applied automatically when you start this challenge. It will be removed upon successful completion.

challenge.title: Double Record Holder
challenge.desc: In two distinct bookstores, find the exact same record in each of the stores. Take a selfie while holding the vinyl. You can scout out both stores, or take selfies with multiple candidates in the first store that you think will be in the second store too, or a combination of both.
challenge.privateNotes: They should ideally be doing this at Half Price Books and Barnes & Noble at Crossroads. They are basically right next to each other.

challenge.title: A Former Staple of Bellevue
challenge.desc: Until 2023, there was a Staples in Bellevue on 140th Ave NE. Figure out what has replaced it, visit it, and snap a selfie in front of it.
challenge.privateNotes: Edgeworks Bel-Red

hard.title: In A Pickle
hard.desc:
Buy a pickle (it can be sliced in a jar) and send us a photo of it to indicate you’ve begun this challenge.

Then, bring it to a pickleball court. Take a photo with your pickle sitting on the pickleball court.

You will be reimbursed up to $5 for the pickle or pickle jar. (Reimbursement will not be provided to teams that start this challenge with fewer than 80 points)

You must bring the pickle jar to the finish line or you will receive a point penalty. The five-point penalty is applied automatically when you start this challenge. It will be removed upon successful completion.

hard.title: Book Conduit, Eastside Edition
hard.desc:
Check out a book at the Bellevue Library (and send a photo of it to us to start the challenge), and then return it to the Crossroads Library Connection (and send a photo of the return process).

If you do not have a library card with the King County Library System, you will need to sign up for one on the spot.

Failure to return the book before the end of the game will result in a 30 point penalty. The point penalty is applied automatically when you start this challenge. It will be removed upon successful completion.
hard.privateNotes: The book must be checked out at Bellevue Library and returned to Crossroads.
